name: html-resume (mnjul)

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of writing the layout by hand when you need to fit completed single-page resume HTML into strict Letter paper geometry, two columns, and print-to-PDF styles, because native implementations fail on inch-based page geometry, timeline alignment, and browser print breaks. It is not a JSON Resume renderer.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can write resume content but cannot hit 8.5x11in geometry, a full-height sidebar, date decoration lines, and printed backgrounds in one attempt; this template fixes those fragile CSS constraints.

data_in.note: Upstream has no data API; the input is the HTML shape inside resume.html's body. You must preserve class names such as #main, #sidebar, .main-block, .blocks, .date, .decorator, and .details for the styles to match.

schema.body_html: string -- body fragment only; the root level must contain section#main and aside#sidebar, and experience entries use .blocks > .date + .decorator + .details

spec.note: Upstream is fixed to Letter portrait: 8.5in x 11in, or 816x1056px at 96 CSS px/in. Preview uses these explicit pixel dimensions. Do not use vh or percentage heights; A4 is not supported by this template.

when_to_use: 需要把已写好的单页简历 HTML 套进严格 Letter 纸张、左右栏与 print-to-PDF 样式时用它而非手写,因为原生在英寸级纸张几何、时间线对齐和浏览器打印断行上失败;非 JSON Resume 渲染器。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写简历内容但做不到一次命中 8.5×11in 几何、侧栏满高、日期装饰线与打印背景;该模板把这些易碎 CSS 约束固定下来。

data_in.note: 上游没有数据 API;输入是 resume.html 的 body 内部 HTML 形状。必须保留 #main、#sidebar、.main-block、.blocks、.date、.decorator、.details 等类名,样式才会命中。
data_in._why_no_example: HTML 是 AI 原生记法,这里用类名契约钉死模板所吃的结构,不附 minimal example。

schema.body_html: string —— 仅 body 内部片段;根层必须含 section#main 与 aside#sidebar,经历项使用 .blocks > .date + .decorator + .details
schema.lang?: string —— shell 的语言标签,默认 'en'

spec.note: 上游固定 Letter portrait:8.5in×11in,按 96 CSS px/in 即 816×1056px。预览显式使用这组像素尺寸,禁止 vh 或百分比高;A4 不是本模板能力。

carriers.widget: conditional:shadowRoot 必须允许外部 stylesheet link 与 Font Awesome 字体;原模板只验证过 Letter 纸张,预览可用但打印应优先 artifact/codex 独立文档
carriers.codex: conditional:需三个 CSS/font CDN 资源;无 JS、worker、wasm 或上行能力要求

isolation.evidence: 无运行时 JS,但 artifact/codex boot 把 normalize.css(全局 reset)+font-awesome+style.css 三个 <link> 追加进 document.head 且默认 media=all → 影响宿主整页;widget boot 已正确改落 shadowRoot。style.css 的 body{}(32行)与 @page{}(1行)为文档级规则,shadow 内不生效——#main/#sidebar 为 id 选择器+组件 class 可在 shadow 命中,widget boot 用内联 font-family/line-height 补偿 body 层排版,真实打印纸张几何(@page)仍需 artifact/codex 文档级。
